title: Figure 3 What a in A quantitative method for collecting water mites in lotic, riffle-run habitats for water quality biomonitoring
author: Stenger, Logan R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3 What a single collection site should look like after the proposed three-minute collection effort. The blue arrows indicate stacked rocks that were stacked upstream of the net to better direct flow into the net. Large rocks were moved before digging into the substrate, while medium-sized and smaller rocks were placed as the substrate was dug up.
steps_raw: Figure 3 What a single collection site should look like after the proposed three-minute collection effort. The blue arrows indicate stacked rocks that were stacked upstream of the net to better direct flow into the net.
